name: Aebleskiver
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks.
2. Gradually add sugar, salt, and buttermilk to the egg yolks.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, and baking powder into another small bowl.
4. Add the sifted ingredients to the egg mixture and stir until combined.
5. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites with a fork.
6. Grease each cup of an aebleskiver pan with a small amount of fat (e.g., butter).
7. Fill each cup about 2/3 full with the batter.
8. Place a small teaspoon of apple sauce on top of the batter in each cup.
9. Cover the apple sauce with a few drops of batter, sealing it completely.
10. Carefully turn the cakes over using a fork to ensure they are fully inverted.
11. Bake until golden brown and cooked through on both sides.
12. Serve immediately with butter and maple syrup or jam.
NOTE: Be careful not to spill any apple sauce into the cups, as this can cause the aebleskiver to stick during cooking.
